Fast Back Pain Relief! - 15 Minute Yoga Stretches For Back Pain & Sciatica Relief Exercises 

Meera and Katrina go through a simple yoga routine for fast back pain relief. This follow along at home yoga workout contains stretches and back pain exercises to help you feel better quickly. 

Meera Hoffman & Katrina Rupman teach Yoga classes in Austin, Texas.

Visit Meera Hoffman's website at;
http://www.meerahoffman.com
